title: agrostis vulgaris var. glaucina
intro: Agrostis vulgaris var. glaucina, commonly known as Blue bent grass, is a type of grass found in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Blue bent grass can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction, often used in herbal teas or tinctures, though more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
